hooks.command: bash -c 'STANDARDS_HASH=$(git -C standards rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null); CACHED_HASH=$(cat .claude/.standards-version 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$STANDARDS_HASH" ]; then git submodule update --init --recursive 2>/dev/null; STANDARDS_HASH=$(git -C standards rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null); fi; if [ -z "$STANDARDS_HASH" ]; then echo "[bootstrap] Kein standards-Submodule gefunden"; cat .claude/context.md 2>/dev/null || true; elif [ "$STANDARDS_HASH" != "$CACHED_HASH" ]; then py standards/scripts/maintain_tools.py --setup 2>&1; echo "$STANDARDS_HASH" > .claude/.standards-version; echo "[bootstrap] Standards aktualisiert ($STANDARDS_HASH)"; else cat .claude/context.md 2>/dev/null || true; fi'
